title: Ritsukos true intentions with Gendo
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko's true intentions with Gendo             Quote Post by sofze » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:39 pm Hi, I was just reading the character bios in evageeks (remarkable by the way) and reading that Ritsuko has always tried to be as accomplished as her mother... Could it be that by having an affair with gendo she was trying to suceed where her mother had failed. I do realize that ritsuko did fall in love eventually (still can't understand why) but it could have been an initial motive. What do you think?? Sorry if my english is far from perfect

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:49 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6035 Sart here. There's some interesting material here on the Gendo/Ritsuko relationship in context of latter episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 21, 2010 3:31 pm That pic she keeps on her computer gives me the impression that she might have had a thing for Gendo back when she was still in high school. It isn't unheard of for mothers and daughters to compete in this fashion when they have more of a dysfunctional 'sisterly' relationship as seems somewhat likely from Naoko's own comments, and that gives a whole new level of meaning to the scene in ep20 when she catches them making out. It also puts another spin on her jealousy of Rei if she too was essentially 'the newer model' at one point.

[]: Ritsuko's true intentions with Gendo             Quote Post by sofze » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:39 pm Hi, I was just reading the character bios in evageeks (remarkable by the way) and reading that Ritsuko has always tried to be as accomplished as her mother... Could it be that by having an affair with gendo she was trying to suceed where her mother had failed. I do realize that ritsuko did fall in love eventually (still can't understand why) but it could have been an initial motive. What do you think?? Sorry if my english is far from perfect

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Wed Apr 21, 2010 2:49 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6035 Sart here. There's some interesting material here on the Gendo/Ritsuko relationship in context of latter episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 21, 2010 3:31 pm That pic she keeps on her computer gives me the impression that she might have had a thing for Gendo back when she was still in high school. It isn't unheard of for mothers and daughters to compete in this fashion when they have more of a dysfunctional 'sisterly' relationship as seems somewhat likely from Naoko's own comments, and that gives a whole new level of meaning to the scene in ep20 when she catches them making out. It also puts another spin on her jealousy of Rei if she too was essentially 'the newer model' at one point.
